creator: matthias@petermann-it.de
text:
Hi William,

thanks for the followup. After running portlint it appeared to me that  
setting USES= gettext is required. If this is not the case, it can be  
dropped.

Thanks & kind regards,
Matthias


Zitat von William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com>:

> Hi,
>
> I see no reason for USES= gettext, why do you need that?
>
> Thanks
